{{CargoOrgan
|name=Psychic Pituitary
|type=Common
|rank=orange
|id=10867
|idx=74
|description=The pituitary gland is the most important endocrine gland in the human body, which can produce a variety of hormones. Anatomical studies of superheroes have found that their pituitaries had all undergone huge mutations!
|skill=
|hp=1636
|def=300
|atk=167
|rush=214
|gene1=Fire DMG +90
|gene2=Wind DMG +90
|gene3=Per 30 Star Coin redeems, {race} RUSH +70
Star Coin Redeems: 90/90
|gene4=Military Merits gives +60 Star Coins
|gene5=Star Coins from Free Daily Star Coins +6%
|gene7=Military Merits gives +180 Star Coins (Awakened)
|}}
